tweets.topic: Scams don’t stop at telecom: India needs platform-neutral communication rules
tweets.tweet: India's telecom regulator pushed for platform-neutral communication rules to combat rising scams across all messaging services. Seems like WhatsApp, Telegram, and Signal finally get treated like telephones—only took countless fraud victims to make that happen.

tweets.topic: $400 million Coinbase scam: What role did THIS Indian call centre play in the company's biggest-ever fraud?
tweets.tweet: Coinbase fell victim to a ₹3,300 crore fraud orchestrated by an Indian call centre that deceived employees into transferring company funds. Turns out even crypto companies aren't immune to good old-fashioned social engineering — your security is only as strong as the person an...

tweets.topic: Xiaomi 17 vs Samsung Galaxy S26 vs iPhone 17: Price in India, Specifications and Features Compared
tweets.tweet: Xiaomi 17 starts at ₹28,999, Samsung Galaxy S26 at ₹54,999, and iPhone 17 at ₹79,999 with varying specs and features. Pick your poison based on budget — flagship performance or flagship prices, Indians always choose the best value for money. #SmartphoneShowdown #IndianTech

tweets.topic: Smartphones India’s top export with $30 billion shipments- Apple, Samsung key drivers
tweets.tweet: Smartphones became India's top export at $30 billion shipments, with Apple and Samsung leading the charge. Turns out we're not just consuming tech — we're building the devices the world actually wants. #MakeInIndia #TechExport

tweets.topic: 7 in 10 consumers in India encountered tech support scams last year, highest globally: Microsoft
tweets.tweet: Microsoft data reveals 7 out of 10 Indian consumers fell victim to tech support scams last year—the worst globally. Guess we're leading in something, just not the way we wanted to. #CyberSecurity #IndianTech

tweets.topic: Samsung Brings iPhone-Style Upgrade Plan To India: Get The Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra At Half Its Price
tweets.tweet: Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra now available at half price through their new upgrade plan in India. Finally, flagship phones won't require selling a kidney — just your old device and some monthly payments. #Samsung #IndianTech

tweets.topic: RBI acts tough against cyber frauds, directs all banks to use DoT’s FRI technology to protect bank custome
tweets.tweet: RBI mandates all Indian banks to adopt DoT's FRI technology to combat cyber fraud and protect customer accounts. Your bank finally gets serious about security — let's hope they implement it before hackers do. #Cybersecurity #BankingSafety

tweets.topic: Govt plans new smartphone export incentives in a boost for Apple, Samsung
tweets.tweet: Government announces new smartphone export incentives targeting Apple and Samsung manufacturing in India. Great news for factory workers, but your phone prices won't drop anytime soon—corporations always keep the savings. #IndianTech #MakeInIndia

tweets.topic: Not frequently checking Amazon and Flipkart accounts? Credit fraud misusing unused e-commerce accounts
tweets.tweet: Amazon and Flipkart accounts left dormant for months are becoming honeypots for credit card fraud and unauthorized purchases. Time to dust off those forgotten logins before scammers turn your unused account into their personal shopping mall. #CyberSecurity #IndianEcommerce

tweets.topic: Supply-chain scam: Ahmedabad police dismantle gadget-swapping interstate syndicate
tweets.tweet: Ahmedabad police busted an interstate gadget-swapping syndicate that was duping consumers with fake supply chains. So those "sealed" boxes you bought might've contained someone else's returned junk — welcome to Indian e-commerce reality. #TechScam #ConsumerAlert
